description_long: This ornate guard rail features two robust cylindrical posts at either end, each topped with a decorative cap. The central section consists of a series of vertical and horizontal metal bars, with circular and arched motifs that add an elegant, classical touch. The base is solid and rectangular, adorned with a floral relief pattern that enhances its decorative appeal. The metallic elements appear to be brass or bronze, giving the rail a warm, antique finish, while the posts and base have a stone-like texture. The structure is designed to be both functional and visually appealing, suitable for upscale urban environments such as parks, plazas, or historic districts. The overall build suggests durability and a fixed installation, with no visible moving parts.
description: An ornate guard rail with decorative metalwork, cylindrical posts, and a floral-patterned base, finished in antique brass and stone textures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full decorative metalwork, both posts, and the floral relief on the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical post and the thickness of the base, with minimal visibility of the rail details.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the same decorative metalwork and base details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again focusing on the cylindrical post and base thickness, with little detail of the railwork.
